name: achillea millefolium
title: achillea millefolium benefits
description: Achillea millefolium eases menstrual cramps, which refers to the reduction of pain and discomfort experienced by women during their menstrual cycle due to uterine contractions. This benefit is important because menstrual cramps can be debilitating, causing women to miss work or school, and can also be a symptom of more serious underlying conditions, such as endometriosis or adenomyosis. The plant's ability to ease menstrual cramps is attributed to its bioactive constituents, including ...
